caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Waves Affect Bimini Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini in the Bahamas is experiencing moderate south-southeast winds sustained at 24 knots with wave heights reaching 6.5 feet and an 8-second swell period. A 70 percent chance of rain is expected, while Turks and Caicos sees lighter winds near 21 knots with less significant marine impacts.

mediterranean.headline: Small Craft Advisory in Effect for Haifa Waters Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing sustained winds of 22 knots with wave heights reaching 7.3 feet and a dominant swell from the WNW at a 7-second period. Rain probability is high at 97 percent, indicating wet conditions alongside the Small Craft Advisory for mariners navigating these eastern Mediterranean waters.
